# ToolsForge - Free AI & Developer Tools
> 21 free online tools for AI developers and creators. No signup required.

## AI Tools

### Token Counter
Count tokens and estimate API costs for GPT-4, Claude, Llama, and other AI models.
URL: https://toolsforge.co/tools/token-counter.html
Best for: Developers working with AI APIs who need to estimate costs before making calls.

### API Cost Calculator
Compare AI API pricing across OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and other providers.
URL: https://toolsforge.co/tools/api-calculator.html
Best for: Planning AI budgets and comparing provider costs.

### System Prompt Builder
Build professional system prompts with structured components and templates.
URL: https://toolsforge.co/tools/prompt-builder.html
Best for: Creating consistent AI assistants and agents.

### Prompt Generator
Generate creative prompts for ChatGPT, Claude, and other AI models.
URL: https://toolsforge.co/tools/prompt-generator.html
Best for: Getting unstuck and finding prompt inspiration.

### Prompt Optimizer
Analyze and improve prompts for better AI responses. Get a quality score and suggestions.
URL: https://toolsforge.co/tools/prompt-optimizer.html
Best for: Improving prompt quality and getting better AI outputs.

### Prompt Templates Library
100+ free AI prompt templates for business, writing, coding, and marketing.
URL: https://toolsforge.co/tools/prompt-templates.html
Best for: Finding ready-to-use prompts for common tasks.

### AI Use Case Generator
Discover practical AI applications for your industry and role.
URL: https://toolsforge.co/tools/ai-use-cases.html
Best for: Finding AI automation opportunities in your work.

### Prompt Chainer
Build multi-step AI workflows by chaining prompts together.
URL: https://toolsforge.co/tools/prompt-chainer.html
Best for: Creating complex AI workflows with multiple steps.

### LLM Pricing Comparison
Compare pricing across 40+ AI models including GPT-4, Claude, Gemini, Llama.
URL: https://toolsforge.co/tools/llm-pricing.html
Best for: Choosing the most cost-effective AI model.

### AI Model Picker
Interactive quiz to find the best AI model for your specific use case.
URL: https://toolsforge.co/tools/ai-model-picker.html
Best for: Choosing between ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and other models.

### AI Tools Directory
Curated list of the best AI tools for productivity and creativity.
URL: https://toolsforge.co/tools/ai-tools-directory.html
Best for: Discovering new AI tools and services.

## Developer Tools

### JSON Formatter
Format, beautify, minify, and validate JSON with syntax highlighting.
URL: https://toolsforge.co/tools/json-formatter.html

### URL Encoder/Decoder
Encode or decode URLs and URI components for web development.
URL: https://toolsforge.co/tools/url-encoder.html

### Base64 Encoder/Decoder
Convert text to Base64 or decode Base64 strings.
URL: https://toolsforge.co/tools/base64.html

### Hash Generator
Generate MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, and SHA-512 hashes securely.
URL: https://toolsforge.co/tools/hash-generator.html

### Markdown Preview
Write Markdown and see it rendered in real-time.
URL: https://toolsforge.co/tools/markdown-preview.html

## Text Tools

### Word Counter
Count words, characters, sentences, and paragraphs instantly.
URL: https://toolsforge.co/tools/word-counter.html

### Case Converter
Convert text to uppercase, lowercase, title case, and more.
URL: https://toolsforge.co/tools/case-converter.html

## Generators

### Password Generator
Generate strong, secure passwords with customizable complexity.
URL: https://toolsforge.co/tools/password-generator.html

### Lorem Ipsum Generator
Generate placeholder text for designs and mockups.
URL: https://toolsforge.co/tools/lorem-ipsum.html

### Color Picker
Pick colors and convert between HEX, RGB, and HSL formats.
URL: https://toolsforge.co/tools/color-picker.html

---

## About ToolsForge

ToolsForge provides free, privacy-focused tools that run entirely in your browser. No data is collected or sent to servers.

Part of the KaiPrompts ecosystem: https://kaiprompts.com

For premium AI prompts with 500+ professionally crafted templates, visit KaiPrompts.
